baseline_p50_ms.description: The p50 latency of the unoptimized endpoint in milliseconds.

id.description: A unique timeline identifier, such as A, B, or C.

strategy.description: The implementation approach tested in this timeline.

p50_ms.description: The measured p50 endpoint latency after this change in milliseconds.

diff_lines.description: Total changed lines in the candidate patch.

tests_passed.description: Whether the required correctness test suite passed.

candidates.description: One to three independently tested code-change candidates.
